name: Smoking Gunpowder
descs:
[Effects apply only to #1, #2 Deployed Identities]

Turn End: If an Attack Skill inflicting [Burst] Potency or Count has been used at least once this turn, gain 1 [Agility] next turn.

If this unit's Speed is at 6+, Attack Skills inflicting [Burst] Potency or Count deal +12.5% damage.

[Effects apply only to #1, #2, and #3 Deployed Identities]

Turn End: If an Attack Skill inflicting [Burst] Potency or Count has been used at least once this turn, gain 1 [Agility] next turn.

If this unit's Speed is at 5+, Attack Skills inflicting [Burst] Potency or Count deal +15% damage.

[Effects apply only to #1, #2, and #3 Deployed Identities]

Turn End: If an Attack Skill inflicting [Burst] Potency or Count has been used at least once this turn, gain 1~2 [Agility] next turn.

If this unit's Speed is at 4+, Attack Skills inflicting [Burst] Potency or Count deal +20% damage.
